SEARCH
Package org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.world.helpers

Class WorldFolderResolver

java.lang.Object
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.world.helpers.WorldFolderResolver
@AvailableSince("5.7") public final class WorldFolderResolver extends Object

Utility class for resolving the file system location of a world folder.

This class handles the differences in world folder locations between server versions, particularly the new dimension storage system introduced in PaperMC 26.1 which stores worlds in a dimensions folder under the world level directory.

Since:
5.7

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NotNull File
    resolve(@NotNull MultiverseWorld multiverseWorld)
    Resolves the world folder file path for the given Multiverse world.
    static @NotNull File
    resolve(@NotNull WorldKeyOrName keyOrName)
    Resolves the world folder file path for the given world key or name.
    static @NotNull File
    resolveAsDimensionKey(@NotNull org.bukkit.NamespacedKey namespacedKey)
    Gets the world folder using the new dimension storage path format of [namespace]/[key].
    static @NotNull File
    resolveAsLegacyWorldName(@NotNull String worldName)
    Gets the world folder using the legacy world name format from the server root directory.

  • Method Details

    • resolve

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public static @NotNull File resolve(@NotNull @NotNull WorldKeyOrName keyOrName)
      Resolves the world folder file path for the given world key or name.
      This method automatically selects the appropriate resolution method based on whether the server is using the new dimension storage system introduced in PaperMC 26.1.
      Parameters:
      keyOrName - The world key or name to resolve.
      Returns:
      The resolved world folder file.
      Since:
      5.7

    • resolve

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public static @NotNull File resolve(@NotNull @NotNull MultiverseWorld multiverseWorld)
      Resolves the world folder file path for the given Multiverse world.
      This method automatically selects the appropriate resolution method based on whether the server is using the new dimension storage system introduced in PaperMC 26.1.
      Parameters:
      multiverseWorld - The Multiverse world to resolve.
      Returns:
      The resolved world folder file.
      Since:
      5.7

    • resolveAsDimensionKey

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public static @NotNull File resolveAsDimensionKey(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.NamespacedKey namespacedKey)
      Gets the world folder using the new dimension storage path format of [namespace]/[key].
      This method is only valid for PaperMC 26.1 and above. For earlier server versions, use resolveAsLegacyWorldName(String) instead.
      Parameters:
      namespacedKey - The namespaced key of the world.
      Returns:
      The resolved world folder file using the new dimension storage format.
      Since:
      5.7

    • resolveAsLegacyWorldName

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public static @NotNull File resolveAsLegacyWorldName(@NotNull @NotNull String worldName)
      Gets the world folder using the legacy world name format from the server root directory.
      This method is the default for server versions before PaperMC 26.1.
      Parameters:
      worldName - The name of the world.
      Returns:
      The resolved world folder file using the legacy world name format.
      Since:
      5.7
